keyFindings.description: Line 518 references stale draft-based review signaling ('If the PR was converted to draft but has no review comments'). Should reference changes_requested review state instead.
Retro doc references non-existent POST /pr/draft-status endpoint and setDraftStatus() function. The approach pivoted to replacing draft signaling entirely, making this doc misleading.
No buildIssueState integration test with prReviewState: 'changes_requested'. Minor gap since suggestAction unit test covers it directly.
